determinism_note: This file intentionally contains no timestamp; SHA-256 is a function only of the registered inputs.
discriminator_vs_qg_liv: Standard QG-LIV signatures are energy-dependent: Δt ∝ E (linear) or Δt ∝ E² (quadratic). GSC predicts NO E-dependence; instead, stochastic variance correlated with line-of-sight DM column density. A positive observation of energy-flat structure-correlated dispersion would distinguish GSC σ(x) from QG-LIV.
physics_status: Parametric σ(x) gradient model. The k_grad coupling is a free parameter; the σ(x,t) field equation derivation in Section 6 of GSC_Framework.md is gating piece for narrowing it to a specific predicted value. Energy-flat signature distinguishes from QG-LIV.

registered_couplings.k_grad_units_note: k_grad has SI units of s × m^{-1/2}; corrected v0.2 from earlier dimensionless misdescription

title: TeV blazar arrival-time dispersion (energy-flat, structure-correlated)
